title: ImageRequest
description: Params in for the text2image layer: one subject description plus sampler settings.

prompt.description: Subject description. The layer wraps it in a single-object framing template unless rawPrompt is true.

rawPrompt.description: Send prompt to the sampler verbatim, with no framing template.

seed.description: Omit for a deterministic seed derived from the prompt.

outDir.description: Directory the PNG is written to. The result envelope references it by path.
